title: Reject ambiguous cleanup scope
outcome: Cleanup now stops before acting when the workspace cannot be resolved.

motivation.observed_problem: An unresolved workspace could flow into candidate discovery.
motivation.why_it_matters: A destructive command must fail closed when its boundary is unknown.

invariants.title: Ambiguity stops action
invariants.body: No candidate is deleted without one resolved workspace.

code_evidence.claim: Fail closed at the command boundary
code_evidence.explanation: The guard returns before candidate discovery begins.
